paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 20, 2026. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. recently announced its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will be hosted on August 13, 2026, according to a news headline from FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026. This announcement is the most recent news item available.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a total of 25 filings in the feed, with one Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and 8-K filings on July 15, July 13, and July 9, 2026, which disclose the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of a note offering, respectively.
